title: enchant-golden-apple-reborn
body:
This mod adds a recipe for the Enchanted Golden Apple, which contains an apple and eight gold nuggets, as well as 2 achievements
1.Notch apple obtains enchanted golden apples
2. King's Reign Eat the enchanted golden apple to obtain
, this mod also modifies the health regeneration effect of the enchanted golden apple, changing the original 20 seconds of health regeneration 1 to 60 seconds of health regeneration 5, which I think is equivalent to 60 seconds of invincibility

After version 1.5, golden apples can be turned into enchanted golden apples by enchanting them on an enchantment table.
